# GitHub Guide

## Scope
- This document contains GitHub-related working context that should not be duplicated in `AGENTS.md`.
- Before proposing or executing GitHub-related work, also review Markdown files under `.github/`.

## Repository References
- GitHub repository: `dgryoo/football-matching-service`

## Backlog Process
1. User defines or approves backlog content.
2. AI may draft backlog text, but must not create GitHub issues without explicit confirmation.
3. Approved backlog items can then be created with `gh`.

## Backlog Files
- Issue form template: `.github/ISSUE_TEMPLATE/backlog.yml`
- Issue template config: `.github/ISSUE_TEMPLATE/config.yml`

## Backlog Template Fields
- Backlog type
- Summary
- Background / problem
- Goal
- In scope
- Out of scope
- Acceptance criteria
- References
- Notes

## GitHub Project Notes
- Confirmed GitHub Project: `football matching service`
- Confirmed project owner: `dgryoo`
- Previously observed project items:
  - `프로젝트 기본 셋팅`
  - `테스트 백로그`
- `테스트 백로그` issue and project item were already removed/closed during this session.
